title: How We Used VBA to Make a Pathology Lab Application
description: An in-depth case study exploring how Visual Basic for Applications (VBA) can streamline and automate reporting pipelines for medical labs, with real code walkthrough.

title: Demystifying Cyber Risk with Machine Learning

title: Exploratory Data Analysis: From Data Chaos to Business Opportunity
